hero.title: I build web apps that actually work.
hero.tagline: Full-stack developer from Egypt. I like clean code, but I care more about shipping something that solves a real problem.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.message: Got a project in mind, or just want to say salam? My inbox is open, and I actually reply.

about.title: About me
bio: I build web apps with Next.js and React. That's most of what I do. Over the past few years I've shipped production apps for clients and built internal tools and dashboards that people actually use every day. I work across the stack, from component architecture down to Express backends.

I've done a bit of everything, from turning Figma designs into pixel-perfect UIs to building data pipelines and a student tracking system. Right now I'm focused on the React and Next.js side of things. If you have something worth building, I'm probably interested.
certificates: Advanced Full-Stack Web Development — EGFWD | Udacity
Front End Web Development Professional — EGFWD | Udacity
about.note: Military service fulfilled. Based in Egypt.
